TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Leung_Chun-ying, title = Leung_Chun-ying, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Leung_Chun-ying} }

S.FORM: Leung Chun-ying ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 8, Leung Chun-ying, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Hong kong ta' misuw hya' ga Leung Chun-ying, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Leung Chun-ying ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 8, Leung Chun-ying, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Hong kong ta' misuw hya' ga Leung Chun-ying, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: leuŋ ʦ~ʨħun-jiŋ rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, leuŋ ʦ~ʨħun-jiŋ, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ħoŋ koŋ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa leuŋ ʦ~ʨħun-jiŋ, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
